blockers: Most rows still collapse to large diamond placeholders instead of the small S-52/S-101 point, text, arrow, or facility glyphs.
Route/track/scalebar rows lose directional arrows, track lines, scalebar segments, or unknown-direction question-mark cues.
Terminal, signal-station, and service rows need circular/board/text/icon detail rather than generic point diamonds.
Only SMCFAC02 is an automated first-pass visual pass; it is not human-final approved.

verdicts.expected: PSSARE01 should follow the provider reference symbol/pattern for a PSSA area, not a generic dashed area tile.

verdicts.required_change: Replace the dashed-square placeholder with the PSSARE01 reference area symbol/pattern from S-101/OpenCPN.
